title: feedback output schema (canonical)
description: Canonical machine-readable counterpart of the /feedback Markdown report. Written alongside `feedback-YYYY-MM-DD-HHMM.md` as `feedback-YYYY-MM-DD-HHMM.json` with full content parity. Consumed by `/plugin-author fix-feedback --from <path>.json` to build a fix-cycle plan. Reparsing the Markdown is a degraded fallback only — this JSON is the contract.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Bump on backward-incompatible changes only.

ts.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the run started.

tool_version.description: ai-assets plugin version that produced this report, e.g. `ai-assets@0.3.13`.

window_days.description: `--days N` window scanned. `0` means all sessions.

project_path.description: Absolute path of the project whose session logs were scanned.

plugin_filter.description: `--plugin NAME` filter applied (e.g. `ai-assets`); `all` means no filter.

sessions_scanned.description: Number of session JSONL files actually parsed.

malformed_lines.description: Number of JSONL lines skipped due to JSON parse errors.

report_md_path.description: Path to the paired Markdown report. Empty string when no MD is being written.

verdict.description: Overall health verdict. RED if any error finding; YELLOW if any warn (and no errors); GREEN if all info or no findings; INSUFFICIENT_DATA when sessions_scanned == 0.

findings.description: Aggregated findings. Each entry represents a unique (source_kind, source_identity, signature) tuple with a count and up to 3 representative excerpts.

finding_id.description: Stable id within this report, e.g. `f-001`. Reused by `/plugin-author fix-cycles/<stamp>.json` to mark closed findings.

source_identity.description: Hook script name, subagent name, skill name, command name, or system event subtype.

signature.description: Normalized error string with absolute paths masked to `<path>` and numbers collapsed — so recurring failures collapse into one finding.

count.description: Number of raw events that collapsed into this finding.

first_seen.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the earliest occurrence (empty when unknown).

last_seen.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the latest occurrence (empty when unknown).

excerpts.description: Up to 3 representative raw event excerpts (≤ 400 chars each).

asset_hint.description: Optional path to the plugin asset most likely responsible (e.g. `plugin/hooks/scripts/subagent-depth-guard.py`). When absent, `/plugin-author` resolves it from (source_kind, source_identity).

suggested_action.description: Optional remediation hint surfaced by the worker.

owner_role_hint.description: Optional DEV role suggestion (e.g. `python-engineer`, `prompt-engineer`). Honored by `/plugin-author fix-feedback` when set.

groups.description: Index of finding_ids grouped by an axis (currently `source_kind`). Lets downstream tools batch related findings without re-scanning the findings array.
